title: Blackspur BB-DB140 Flat Wood Drill Bit Set
features: Manufacture from precision ground carbon steel
Ideal for use with power drills
Set contains drill bits of size 10mm, 12mm, 16mm, 18mm, 20mm and 25mm
Come with a handy vinyl pouch for storage
description: Product Description Blackspur flat wood bits are suitable for use with power drills only, these flat wood drill bits are manufactured with 1/4-inch hex shaped stems and come with a handy vinyl pouch for storage. Set contains drill bits of size 10mm, 12mm, 16mm, 18mm, 20mm and 25mm. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 6x Drill Bit
